reasoning: As of April 13, 2025, Solana (SOL) is trading at approximately $130. The Polymarket price on April 3 was 4% when SOL was trading around $118, indicating the market viewed a rally to $190 as highly improbable at the start of the month. To reach $190 by April 30, SOL would need to surge by about 46% within just 17 days. While standard cryptocurrency volatility allows for significant swings, typical options pricing for a 46% out-of-the-money move in slightly over two weeks under ~100-120% implied volatility yields a probability of around 3% to 5%. Recent technical analysis and negative catalysts (e.g., massive token unlocks and whale sell-offs early in April) suggest that upward momentum remains constrained. Therefore, observing a 1-minute candle of $190+ on the Binance SOLUSDT pair before April 30 is highly unlikely.
